# Princeton University Class of 2000

> Princeton University's Class of 2000 alumni organization. Founded at Princeton University, the class maintains an active alumni community through reunions, class notes, and shared experiences.

## About
The Princeton University Class of 2000 is an alumni class organization affiliated with the Alumni Association of Princeton University. The class motto is "Bid Every Care Withdraw." The class organizes major reunions every five years and maintains regular communication through class notes, newsletters, and social media.

## Reunions
- [Reunions 2026](https://reunions.princeton2000.org): 26th Reunion, May 24-27, 2026
- [Registration](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/registration/): Reunion registration and housing
- [Schedule](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/schedule/): Event schedule and activities

## Community
- [Class Notes](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/notes/): Regular updates from classmates
- [Letters](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/letters/): Communications from class leadership
- [FAQ](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/faq/): Frequently asked questions

## Leadership
- [Officers](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/officers/): Current class officers
- [Committee](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/committee-reunions/): Reunion committee members
- [Leadership](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/leadership/): Class leadership structure

## History
- [Honorary Classmates](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/honorary-classmates/): Honorary class members
- [Library](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/library/): Class archives and history
- [Constitution](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/constitution/): Class constitution
